market_size.sam: $28.5B — Application Security Testing + DevSecOps + CTEM (2026 est.)
market_size.som: $2.5B — Mid-market and enterprise CTEM/Decision Intelligence platforms (initial addressable)

market_growth.ma_jan_2026: 38 deals — 3rd highest monthly count ever, ~477 projected annually
market_growth.gartner_ctem_prediction: 3x breach reduction for CTEM adopters by 2026
market_growth.agentic_ai_adoption: 67% of orgs (Kiteworks 2026 report), 100% of security leaders have it on roadmap
market_growth.mcp_adoption_forecast: 30% of enterprise app vendors will launch MCP servers in 2026 (Forrester)
market_growth.vllm_status: v0.16.0 — FIPS 140-3 compliant, production standard for self-hosted inference
market_growth.claude_code_security: Feb 20, 2026 — 500+ zero-days found, cyber stocks dropped, industry disruption
market_growth.ai_agent_adoption: 77% of orgs running GenAI in security, 67% using agentic AI (Kiteworks 2026)

competitors.name: Snyk
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Full CTEM lifecycle vs. SCA+SAST only. Multi-LLM consensus vs. single model.

competitors.name: Wiz
competitors.status: Google acquisition closing March 2026. DOJ cleared, EU unconditionally approved Feb 10. Only AU/ZA/TR remain.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Scanner-neutral Switzerland vs. Google lock-in. AppSec-focused vs. cloud-only.

competitors.name: Semgrep
competitors.status: Growing. Semgrep Secure 2026 event (Feb 25). Claims zero false positives.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Multi-LLM consensus (3+ models) vs. single-model. Full CTEM lifecycle vs. SAST-only.

competitors.name: Checkmarx
competitors.aldeci_advantage: We already have AI agents (Brain Pipeline). They just acquired them. Air-gapped capable.

competitors.name: Endor Labs
competitors.aldeci_advantage: 97% noise reduction across ALL scanner types (not just SCA). MPTE verification vs. static analysis.

competitors.name: CrowdStrike
competitors.status: Aggressive M&A. SGNL ($740M) + Seraphic in Jan 2026.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: AppSec-focused vs. endpoint-first. CTEM lifecycle vs. detection-only. Developer-centric.

competitors.name: Orca Security
competitors.status: Forrester Strong Performer. Settled Wiz lawsuit.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: MPTE proves exploitability vs. static analysis. Full AppSec vs. cloud-workload-only.

competitors.name: ArmorCode
competitors.status: Closest ASPM competitor. MCP integration validates our V7.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Native scanners (they aggregate only). MPTE verification. Multi-LLM consensus. Air-gapped capable.

competitors.name: Cyera
competitors.status: One of most heavily funded cybersecurity companies ever. Different category from ALdeci.
competitors.aldeci_advantage: Different market (DSPM vs. CTEM). Potential integration partner.

trends: Agentic AI is the defining theme of 2026 — every vendor embedding autonomous agents
MCP (Model Context Protocol) becoming dominant standard for agent-tool connectivity
Platform consolidation via aggressive M&A (38 deals in Jan 2026 alone)
AI-generated code security emerging as new category (ArmorCode, Semgrep, Endor Labs)
Wiz → Google creates Switzerland opportunity for independent vendors
Browser + identity security expansion by endpoint vendors (CrowdStrike)
AI-enabled adversary operations up 89% YoY (CrowdStrike 2026 Threat Report)
Cybersecurity VC funding remains strong at $20.7B in 2025 (52% YoY growth)
Premium valuations for AI-native security startups vs. non-AI peers
Post-quantum cryptography entering production (Google HTTPS PQC, NIST ML-KEM standardized)
vLLM v0.16 achieves FIPS 140-3 — self-hosted LLM is enterprise-grade
OpenAI deploying to classified DoD networks — air-gapped AI is national security priority
MCP security concerns emerging (prompt injection, tool poisoning) — governance tools launching
Tenable predicts automated remediation gets enterprise go-ahead in 2026
Claude Code Security disrupts traditional SAST/DAST vendors — cyber stocks dropped Feb 20
AI agent security emerges as new category — 92% of professionals concerned about AI agent risks
'Vibe hacking' — adversaries exploiting AI agents via prompt injection and tool misuse
eCrime breakout time hits 27 seconds — automated remediation now critical
Wiz Code integrating Dazz ($450M) for cloud-to-code remediation
Semgrep StackHawk integration addresses DAST gap — validating all-in-one approach
differentiators: 8 built-in fallback scanners (works air-gapped, no external tools needed)
12-step Brain Pipeline (full CTEM lifecycle — no competitor has full loop)
Multi-LLM Consensus (3+ LLMs vote, 85% threshold — beats single-model confidence)
19-phase MPTE Verification (proves exploitability, doesn't just detect)
FAIL Engine (chaos engineering for AppSec — industry first, zero competitors)
Air-gapped deployment with full scanner capability (defense/critical infra ready)
AI-powered AutoFix with 10 fix types and confidence-based auto-apply
MCP-native with 650+ auto-discovered tools (first-mover in AI-native AppSec)
Scanner-neutral Switzerland positioning (no vendor lock-in, day 1 value)
Quantum-secure evidence (FIPS 204 ML-DSA + RSA hybrid — 5-year head start)
Claude Code Security integration story — 'Claude finds, ALdeci decides' — complementary positioning
AI agent security testing via MPTE — emerging attack surface validation
